description_long: This is a red, flexible stand-up pouch of Gibs Tomato Ketchup, prominently featuring a vibrant image of tomatoes, ketchup, and fried snacks on the front. The packaging is made of glossy plastic with a spout at the top for dispensing. The front displays bold white and yellow text, with a green badge indicating it is made with real tomato. The back of the pouch contains detailed product information, including a nutrition facts panel, barcode, and additional branding. The sides are narrow and show the continuation of the red color and some partial graphics. The overall shape is tall and slightly curved, designed for easy handling and storage.
description: A red, glossy plastic pouch of Gibs Tomato Ketchup with a spout, featuring tomato and snack imagery and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Gibs Tomato Ketchup branding, tomato and snack imagery, and a green badge.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile and the spout at the top, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displays product information, nutrition facts, barcode, and additional branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the pouch's slim edge and partial graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular logo with the word 'Gibs' in black text on a white background, located at the top center of the front and back of the pouch.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the pouch features images of tomatoes and the text 'Tomato Ketchup', indicating tomato flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and barcode are visible on the back of the pouch, along with other product information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A green circular badge on the front reads 'MADE WITH REAL TOMATO'.
